dialogue_text: but to the eyes of common mortals I am invisible. I will now seat myself upon my throne, that you may converse with me.
source_excerpt: "I am everywhere," answered the Voice, "but to the eyes of common mortals I am invisible. I will now seat myself upon my throne, that you may converse with me." Indeed, the Voice seemed just then to come straight from the throne itself;...

dialogue_text: We have come to claim our promise, O Oz.
source_excerpt: "We have come to claim our promise, O Oz."
